data.title: What's Going On With Faraday Future Stock Thursday?
data.description: Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc (NASDAQ:FFAI) shares are trading higher. The company on Thursday announced plans to maintain its Nasdaq listing without enacting a reverse stock split.

data.title: Interactive Brokers Disappoints In Q1, Analysts Praise Account Growth Despite Stock Market Bloodbath
data.description: Interactive Brokers reported Q1 results with lower sales and earnings. Goldman Sachs analyst maintains Buy rating and $219 price target.

data.title: Nvidia, AMD Take A $17 Billion Hit In The AI Arms Race, While Broadcom Remains Shielded, Says Analyst
data.description: Nvidia and AMD face major revenue losses as the US government imposes new license requirements for selling their AI-focused chips to China and other countries.
